title: Modnilla 3
description: QoL improvement mods for the mostly Vanilla personal project Modnilla in its third iteration on Minecraft 1.19.3
body:
It's almost tradition now that I host a new Minecraft world in the winter months. Mostly there is a new Minecraft version for my friend group to explore anyway. Every time I recommended them a QoL modlist to install. This time I want to try making a dedicated modpack that they can just download through the Prismlauncher.

The Modpack aims to be optional for the client, so that anyone with a Vanilla client can still join us.
